sql_array: CREATE TABLE hugeint_test (id HUGEINT, value HUGEINT);
INSERT INTO hugeint_test (id, value) VALUES (HUGEINT(1), HUGEINT(123456789012345678901234567890));
UPDATE hugeint_test SET value = HUGEINT(-170141183460469231731687303715884105727) WHERE id = HUGEINT(1);
SELECT id, value FROM hugeint_test WHERE value < HUGEINT(0);
DELETE FROM hugeint_test WHERE id = HUGEINT(1);
